_comment: Scripted-input demo: box-select three regiments (uids 0/1/2 — Spearmen 140, Infantry 120, Archers 90, spawned in a row at y=300 on seed 12345), then one right-drag deploys them along a flank line, split to equal depth. Driven live through the real SelectionManager by tools/demo/DemoInputRecorder.gd. World coordinates; physics ticks (60/s).
